description: Create a reusable GitHub Actions workflow named Build PIP Packages that can be triggered manually or called by another workflow. The workflow builds and publishes Python packages for multiple operating systems, including macOS and Windows. It checks out the repository, sets up C++, Python, and caching, installs build dependencies, updates the PyPI version if specified, builds the package, and uploads artifacts. A subsequent job on an ubuntu-latest environment downloads the artifacts, checks out the repository, sets up Python, and publishes the packages to PyPI using twine with a provided repository URL and credentials.
